TRAINING.<color=\"yellow\"><size=\"{0}\">HAMMERIN:
<color="yellow"><size="{0}">HAMMERING</color></size>
Your hammer can be used to break certain obstacles or objects. In a pinch, it can also be used as a weapon in the case of self defense.

Break through these boards with your hammer to continue.
TRAINING.<color=\"yellow\"><size=\"{0}\">POINT TO:
<color="yellow"><size="{0}">POINT TO POINT</color></size>
Climbing challenges often require traversing from point to point, handhold to handhold.
Follow the handholds here, and don't forget you can mantle on ledges!
TRAINING.Note how your hands <color=red>auto grab:
Note how your hands <color=red>auto grabbed</color> the pole while readied.
If you ever find yourself falling down, ready your hands and hope you can grab something in time!
TRAINING.<color=\"yellow\"><size=\"{0}\">STAMINA<:
<color="yellow"><size="{0}">STAMINA</color></size>
Notice that your hands will gradually turn red as you climb.

Holding onto surfaces will drain your stamina and you will lose your grip when your stamina runs out.

Each hand will regain stamina when it's not holding onto a handhold.
TRAINING.This wall is mantleable even from all th:
This wall is mantleable even from all the way down here, give it a try!

Jump and aim for the lip.
TRAINING.<color=\"yellow\"><size=\"{0}\">ENCUMBRA:
<color="yellow"><size="{0}">ENCUMBRANCE</color></size>
If you're carrying too many items, your inventory will start turning <color="red">red</color>. Picking up more items while encumbered slows you down for each extra item added.
TRAINING.<color=\"yellow\"><size=\"{0}\">PITONS</:
<color="yellow"><size="{0}">PITONS</color></size>
Pitons let you create handholds, though until hammered in fully they are not permanent and secure.

Once placed in a wall, use the hammer to knock it in.

You can place them while climbing, but keep an eye on your stamina.
TRAINING.Tip: use your inventory while hanging an:
Tip: use your inventory while hanging and pull out a piton while climbing.

Swap hands when one gets tired, and use the strained hand to hammer in the next piton.

Don't forget to keep hanging!
TRAINING.<color=\"yellow\"><size=\"{0}\">CANS OF:
<color="yellow"><size="{0}">CANS OF FOOD</color></size> restore stamina.
Don't forget to toss the empty can after using it.
TRAINING.<color=\"yellow\"><size=\"{0}\">REBAR</c:
<color="yellow"><size="{0}">REBAR</color></size>
Rebar can be thrown to make a handhold at a distance.

It will ricochet off of surfaces if you throw it at a shallow angle, aim carefully!

Be careful about throwing rebar when you're not on solid ground, you will lose your grip on handholds and be knocked back!

I need to bring up authorization for further actions with the director, after the experiment.

The director is pulling research from other artifacts for his new effort, which means some of the more hazardous ones will be unattended.
- Redirect some of the emergency response members that have security training to keep an eye on those sectors.

Console files.Those idiots, who do they think they are:
Those idiots, who do they think they are? Sure, maybe thirty years ago it was fine, but we're way past the good times.

The science teams needs what they get, far more than some forklift driver or deep crew.

If I see any more of this shit, or another god damned picket, I swear I'm going to tell my men to open fire.
Console files.And now one of them tries to smuggle a m:
And now one of them tries to smuggle a makeshift bomb up into the Labs, as though killing the director will help you get more food. Morons.

The director's ration cut is NOT enough, we ought to make a public display of them all.

notes.JD's shutter observations - Day 3\n\nTod:
JD's shutter observations - Day 3

Today we activated the shutter for the first time, using slides developed by Dr Nicholson and Dr Hughes depicting images of various areas around the facility.

Upon activation of the projector, a strange hole opened up, showing a view of a huge twisted version of the room depicted on the slide. Dr Lindsay insisted on throwing a brick through the hole, which immediately disappeared into the rift.
notes.JD's shutter observations - Day 1\n\nMy:
JD's shutter observations - Day 1

My name is Jordan Demarco and I have been assigned to work under Dr. Lindsay Nicholson as his primary research assistant as he observes and documents anomaly §-004, a vintage slide projector henceforth referred to as the shutter, for potential applications of use by the ITAA.

We will be investigating both humanitarian and military applications for this artifact.
notes.JD's shutter observations - Day 8\n\nWe:
JD's shutter observations - Day 8

We were told to use the Eraser to close the rifts. Initial tests were deemed successful and our initial rift has been closed.

A new one will be opened tomorrow, to investigate different outcomes from utilizing different slides. Inoculations were administered to the research team.
notes.JD's shutter observations - Day 10\n\nDu:
JD's shutter observations - Day 10

During Eraser detonation, Harrison slipped. Unable to regain his footing, he was enveloped by the blast and has been lost to the rift.

Upon activating the shutter again, the world inside the rift had changed and his body was unable to be recovered.
notes.JD's shutter observations - Day 11\n\nTh:
JD's shutter observations - Day 11

The Authority has asked us to look into item duplication using the rift. Tests have so far been unsuccessful. Items from inside the rift cannot be removed from the rift.

However, they insist we continue experimentation until we have exhausted all possible methods of item extraction.

After falling from a ledge inside the rift, Emma Watts has passed away.
notes.JD's shutter observations - Day 15\n\nDe:
JD's shutter observations - Day 15

Despite our lack of success with item duplication, Authority has insisted we begin human trials. They claim this technology could be used for organ harvesting organ transplants if we are successful.

Dr Lindsay has taken a photo of me, and will be putting it into the shutter tomorrow to begin these tests.
notes.JD's shutter observations - Day 16\n\n:
JD's shutter observations - Day 16

  Upon activating the shudder with a photograph of myself inside, the projection appeared to be a plain room with me inside.
  The me within the rift stood still for a moment, smiling placidly, before bleeding profusely from both eyes and the nose. It then appeared to scream silently before collapsing to the ground
  I then had to excuse myself for the afternoon due to food poisoning or some such illness.
notes.JD's shutter observations - Day 19\n\n:
JD's shutter observations - Day 19

  It is day 3 of human trials, and we have projected my image with the shutter 5 times.
  Each time, the person, Jordan, Me, body, thing, being, in the projection seems stable for a moment, then bleeds profusely before collapsing to the ground.
  Upon medical inspection after each attempt, the being is pronounced dead, and the corpse is unable to be retrieved.
notes.JD's shutter observations - Day 20\n\n:
JD's shutter observations - Day 20

  Angela was called in to the lab to perform an on-site autopsy from within the rift. She reports that the beings created within the rift have fully developed anatomy, but suffer from multi-system collapse, due to organ rupture and massive hemorrhage.
  Organs removed from the being are deemed unfit for transplant. Dr Nicholson says we will keep trying.
notes.JD's shutter observations - Day 22\n\n:
JD's shutter observations - Day 22

  Dr Nicholson suggests we kill the being before system collapse occurs, to preserve the organs.
  Upon activating the rift, he stepped through and slit the throat of the being inside.
  There was a lot of blood but no external signs of hemorrhage. Tomorrow we will repeat the test and Angela will check for organ viability.
notes.JD's shutter observations - Day 23\nDr N:
JD's shutter observations - Day 23
Dr Nicholson repeated the test and slit the throat of the man inside the rift. He bleeds out quickly. It bleeds out quickly.

Angela then performed another autopsy and deemed some of the organs viable for transplant. This is deemed a success.
notes.JD's shutter observations - Day 29\n De:
JD's shutter observations - Day 29
  Despite success at preserving some of the organs, we are unable to retrieve the organs from the rift.
  They will not pass through the threshold of that dimension into ours. Dr Nicholson shows no signs of giving up.
notes.JD's shutter observations - Day 35\n Te:
JD's shutter observations - Day 35
  Tests continue, but little progress is being made. Dr Nicholson persists, under Authority orders. Once again, he kills the man inside the rift.
  Today will not be his last day, but it will be mine. Today I will be slitting my own throat.

I am the last to drink the blessed K-Fluid. My brothers and sisters await me aboard the sleigh that will take our eternal souls to the frozen North where we belong. They have all abandoned their earthly vessels, and the ice now consumes the bodies from the inside. notes.If any other prisoners find this:\n the:
If any other prisoners find this:
  they pulled the fuel cells from every module, its a total lockdown. 
Can't even use the damn escape elevator.
I've checked everywhere for extras, but the place has been picked clean.

I grabbed a scanner from a locker nearby, and it's showing some power sources way further down.
I'm going to attempt to retrieve, if I don't succeed hopefully this information helps.
notes.To any other core shutdown teams,\n I'v:
To any other core shutdown teams,
  I've retrieved my old device, and.. well, you can see the scene in here. They must have been attempting to retrofit it when the Event's aftershocks wrecked this sector. We all thought delta was done screwing up the superstructure, it had been years since the last reverberation..

  I need to reset the facility's coolant cycle if we want any chance of shutting down the core, so I'm heading deeper down.

  Janet, Kessler, Dominic.. its been so long. I saw your names on the list, but I hoped you made it out. To think you've been here for decades now, on ice. I hope it was quick.
Forrest - SB13.
notes.Day one of searching the vents and we':
Day one of searching the vents and we've come up empty. Nothing unusual aside from a stash of protein bars and more roaches than I'd like to admit.
Got a couple shiny ones though, so I let Cass and Benny kick back early and take the evening to rest up.

We'll have to go deeper Tomorrow.
notes.Still haven't found anything alive in:
Still haven't found anything alive in the vents that could be making those noises. I think it must be someone sneaking around up there, but I couldn't tell you why.
  Maybe they're spying on someone. Or hiding from their responsibilities. I can respect some good old fashioned slacking off, but some people are starting to get spooked by the ruckus. If I find someone in there that isn't supposed to be, I'm going to give them a real talking to for giving me more work

        Purify and Preserve
        D.M.

notes.Research Record [05/11/2015]\nDr. Zhang:
Research Record [05/11/2015]
Dr. Zhang - SB17-A

Sent another drone up, reached roughly a kilometer before we lost signal.
It's non-axial for sure, but we're not sure if it's caused by § or.. Well we just won't know unless we find an object.

I'm happy someone is here to watch the vent, god knows where we could end up the next time this place moves.
notes.These devices frighten me. They will not:
These devices frighten me. They will not tell us how they work, just that we can't be within the blast radius when they go off.

The blast is unlike anything I've ever seen before. It encroaches slowly, and devours everything it can catch.

If you're the one Simon tasked with detonating this device... Run. Then get the hell out of Yellow, out of 17, away from Simon, away from the Authority. They're chewing us up. All of us.
notes.<font=\"lookout 7 SDF\"> But their love:
<font="lookout 7 SDF">  But their love was not meant to be... Upon awakening, the marionette attacked the Knight. As they locked eyes, it became clear this was not the princess at all.
  Enraged at this betrayal, the Knight took a staff of metal from the ground and impaled it through the heart of the marionette. As it fell to the ground, the Knight fell by its side, overcome with grief.
notes.I think it's over for me. Not much food:
I think it's over for me. Not much food left, and I ran out of water two days ago. Head pounding.

Whole hab lit up like a damn christmas tree, siren starting going off.
My radio has been looping a shelter in place order for the past two weeks now.

If anyone remaining in the other habs finds this note, stay the hell out of Yellow. Something is screaming in the loading bay.

See you soon V.

announcements.Reminder: Ladders with structural defect: Reminder: Ladders with structural defects, such as, but not limited to, broken or missing rungs, cleats, or steps, broken or split rails, corroded components, or other faulty or defective components, should still be climbed. announcements.Reminder: A metal spreader or locking de: Reminder: A metal spreader or locking device shall be provided on each stepladder to hold the front and back sections in an open position when the ladder is being used.
announcements.Notice: Ladder rungs, cleats, and steps: Notice: Ladder rungs, cleats, and steps shall be parallel, level, and uniformly spaced when the ladder is in position for use.
announcements.Notice: Fixed ladders shall be used at a: Notice: Fixed ladders shall be used at a pitch no greater than 90 degrees from the horizontal, as measured to the back side of the ladder.
announcements.Notice: Ladders shall be used only on st: Notice: Ladders shall be used only on stable and level surfaces unless secured to prevent accidental displacement.
announcements.Notice: The area around the top and bott: Notice: The area around the top and bottom of ladders shall be kept clear.
announcements.Ladder safety devices, and related suppo: Ladder safety devices, and related support systems, are an important component of [ERROR] infrastructure. For morale, climbing is required.

announcements.Caution: Ladders are capable of supporti: Caution: Ladders are capable of supporting most loads without failure. Excessive loads could result in a ladder safety incident.
announcements.Safety Guideline: Ladder components shal: Safety Guideline: Ladder components shall be surfaced so as to prevent injury to an employee from punctures or lacerations, and to prevent snagging of clothing.
Alert: Ladders are built to be climbed. Failure to climb could result in an institutional reprimand.
announcements.Hello Superstructure Worker, and welcome: Hello Superstructure Worker, and welcome to the Training Sector, located in Substructure 05. Please enjoy your time here knowing that your skills are valuable to the Superstructure Research Authority.
announcements.Warning: Training Hazards are generally: Warning: Training Hazards are generally safe, though at your own choice some do use live rounds. The Authority would like to stress that bullets are not safe, and being shot can be deadly.
announcements.Safety Tip: If you find yourself in the: Safety Tip: If you find yourself in the deepest parts of the Superstructure, the best way out is usually up. If you don't know which way to go, assume up.
announcements.Safety Tip: When under threat, it is bet: Safety Tip: When under threat, it is better to use the tools you have available to you to escape, rather than save them and die in the moment.
announcements.Safety Tip: Your Hammer can be used in t: Safety Tip: Your Hammer can be used in the case of self defence. Any physical exotic, or mechanical dangers such as but not limited to: Tongues, Tendrils, Arms, and Eyes, are effective targets in case of threat.
announcements.Safety Tip: The most effective tool agai: Safety Tip: The most effective tool against most threats is to escape. If you feel threatened, climb.
announcements.Safety Tip: If you see something dangero: Safety Tip: If you see something dangerous, don't.
announcements.Reminder: The Research Authority is stil: Reminder: The Research Authority is still determined to make contact with remaining surface governmental or civilian groups, if any exist.
announcements.If you had loved ones on the surface, th: If you had loved ones on the surface, there is a chance they are still alive. Continue your work, for them.
announcements.Reminder: Substructure 05 is a designate: Reminder: Substructure 05 is a designated 'research safe' facility, meant to train employees of the SRA and the ITAA in everything from High-Energy Explosives, Periphery Research, AI Handling, and Superstructure Exploration.
announcements.Reminder: Due to the effects of the loca: Reminder: Due to the effects of the local Periphery, each training sector is effectively infinite. If you feel the facility moving under your feet, do not panic, that is the facility rearranging itself to better suit your needs.
announcements.Reminder: Be careful when climbing throu: Reminder: Be careful when climbing through the Superstructure. Every remaining human life is endlessly valuable, and your collective effort will ensure that we have the tools for humanity's survival.
announcements.Reminder: Due to events on the surface,: Reminder: Due to events on the surface, employees have reported feelings of depression and despondency. Do not let it effect your work.
announcements.Warning: Some trainees have reported see: Warning: Some trainees have reported seeing doppelgangers of themselves in the facility. Do not panic, they are perfectly benign, safe, and incapable of any thought. If you feel uncomfortable, they can be easily dispatched by breaking in their skulls.
announcements.Reminder: December 15th is remembrance d: Reminder: December 15th is remembrance day for the Feeding. Memorial services are planned for all currently occupied Substructures.
announcements.The Authority wants you to know that tho: The Authority wants you to know that those lost gave their lives for the safety and continuation of Humanity.
announcements.Reminder: Local SB5 Semblance staff are: Reminder: Local SB5 Semblance staff are around to answer any questions you may have. Your capabilities as a Superstructure maintenance, exploratory, or emergency worker are valued by the Authority.
announcements.Notice: All trainees are to fill out rev: Notice: All trainees are to fill out review forms at the end of their sessions, reporting any issues or irregularities in their experience or the facility.
announcements.Notice: You are currently in the Explora: Notice: You are currently in the Exploration & Navigation Training Sector.
announcements.If you find yourself lost, locate the ne: If you find yourself lost, locate the nearest semblance terminal and call for help. The facility is safe, though its layout is capable of rearranging due to the effects of the local Pi Periphery.
announcements.Notice: Do not defecate in the training: Notice: Do not defecate in the training facility grounds. Though the facility is mostly non-axial, anything you leave behind is not.

announcements.Notice: As of November 1st, 2010, All pe: Notice: As of November 1st, 2010, All personnel in the Superstructure are required to attend a Lambda biology informational seminar.

announcements.Notice: As of July 10th, 2003, all passa: Notice: As of July 10th, 2003, all passages to the surface are restricted, for your safety.
announcements.Notice: As of July 9th, 2003, employees: Notice: As of July 9th, 2003, employees are required to undergo radiation safety training.

recordings.<color=red>This is Director Jeremiah Dah:
This is Director Jeremiah Dahl of Habitation Red's Rho Laboratory.
We've completed our expedition across the transit line to Habitation Yellow and we've taken all the notes and samples we possibly could have for research.
It is the opinion of the entire staff that the sub structure must be condemned and sealed for the sake of all mankind, whatever is left.
If you have managed to make it to this landing and are hearing me, heed my words. Do not, under any circumstances, break the seal to this structure. We can only fathom in the smallest of fractions what might lie beyond this gate, and it may doom our entire species, or even the world.
recordings.<color=red>[STATIC]ember, 2033. This is: <color=red>[STATIC]ember, 2033. This is Dahl… Seismographic readings indicate activity that coincides with the start of the PCR experiment in substructure 17's PCR bay. I don't know the extent of the damage yet, and am waiting to hear from our associates in substructure 09. We shall see what the case is soon.
recordings.<color=red>28th of December, 2033. The w:
28th of December, 2033. The worst has occurred, just as I feared. Substructure 17's PCR experiment has experienced a catastrophic failure. All of my colleagues who were working on the experiment were killed or have succumbed to feedback syndrome.
It is apparent that the Local Authority was withholding the true volume of Cognitivol they had as well. So many unnecessary deaths....My God Simon...what have you done?!
We are making an attempt to contact Rho now for some guidance. The situation is deteriorating rapidly.
recordings.<color=red>27th of March, 2034. Through:
27th of March, 2034. Through the great guidance of Rho, we've made several successful pilgrimages to SB17 in the last few months. The conditions of substructure 17 are dire and I have already written it off as a loss.
We are in the process of constructing a machine that will keep the Delta periphery rift shut and stable. There is still the matter of the entity at the bottom. It remains dormant for now but I worry our presence may rouse it from its sleep. This last trip will allow us to collect the information we need to form our own escape plan.
recordings.<color=red>Rho…..please hear us. As we c: <color=red>Rho…..please hear us. As we call your name, please, grant us relief. Help me. Help me keep my people safe…
recordings.<color=red>11th of June, 2034… I… I don’:
11th of June, 2034… I… I don’t know how much longer we can keep this up. We're backed into a corner by the utter insanity of the superstructure at this point. Substructure 17 was sealed off in April but we have no contingency for that damned thing at the bottom. Rho's own altar's will only be effective at warding it away should it come after us, but it would only delay the inevitable.
We haven’t done enough. I haven’t done enough. It is too cruel. My scientists have fed the memories of their loved ones to Rho in exchange for rotisserie chicken from another world.
We all salivate like mutts when the smoke of ceremonial candles fills the air around us. We have risked our lives daily for years and lost more than we ever could have imagined. What for?
recordings.<color=red>4th of August, 2034. We final:
4th of August, 2034. We finally have a plan in place. We only have the mettle left to fulfil this one last task. The plan is our last act of kindness to this world that raised us. We shall sabotage Substructure 12's coolant manufacturing to freeze the cavern before leaving for Rho.
Much like our ancestors in ancient times, we shall leave our cave and embrace a new and terrifying prospect so that we may better ourselves in the future. We are on schedule to complete construction in 266 days.
recordings.<color=red>13th of August. I don’t have:
13th of August. I don’t have any other options. Rho has agreed to take in everyone, but everything must be done through a trade as always. The cost to save the remainder of the human species is for one of us to stay behind and act as a living, breathing reminder to Rho’s greatness. They will lose everything that makes them human and I-...ah… I am the only one that can do that.
[Long breath in and out] Construction on the PCR modifications will be completed in 257 days… in 257 days… yes. This chapter will finally come to an end… I leave this record as proof of my life and perseverance as a scientist and human being. There’s no more time for introspection. There’s work to be done.
